arts.ttl: ‘Banana skin’ – Rotherham United vs Birmingham City prediction: The72
arts.sum: The72's writers offer their Rotherham United vs Birmingham City prediction ahead of their League One clash on Saturday afternoon. The post ‘Banana skin’ – Rotherham United vs Birmingham City prediction: The72 appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: Birmingham City agree compensation package as defender completes transfer
arts.sum: Browne turned down the offer of a new contract at St Andrew’s @ Knighthead Park to pursue first team football elsewhere and has been snapped up by the Saddlers. Central defender Browne enjoyed a loan spell at Walsall-based Rushall Olympic last season, appearing 18 times for the Pics alongside Saddlers midfielder Ronan Maher.

arts.ttl: Free agent joins new club following Birmingham City departure
arts.sum: Walsall have signed Rico Browne following his exit from Birmingham City, as announced by their official club website.… The post Free agent joins new club following Birmingham City departure appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: Birmingham City agree third huge deal this week as Tom Brady backing pays off
arts.sum: Birmingham City have extended their partnership with UNDEFEATED, agreeing a multi-year deal with the global sportswear brand. It comes after Blues announced an extension to their kit deal with Nike this week.

arts.ttl: Steve Evans makes Birmingham City points prediction and dubs them 'Galaticos of League One'
arts.sum: Rotherham United boss Steve Evans considers Birmingham City to be the 'Galacticos of League One' after their transfer spend in the summer window. As Blues prepare to descend on South Yorkshire, Evans has complimented the club's recruitment drive and considers Blues to be 'huge'.

arts.ttl: Tom Brady explains Alex Guerrero’s value and the bonus Birmingham City can expect
arts.sum: I met my best friend and body coach Alex Guerrero who’s involved with our organisation here and we’re implementing a set of beliefs that worked and have been tried and tested over a long period of time. Legendary NFL quarterback Brady, now an investor in Blues alongside American investment firm Knighthead, credits Alex Guerrero for helping him play sport at the highest level into his forties.

arts.ttl: Chris Davies issues positive Birmingham City injury update as key duo near returns
arts.sum: Birmingham City boss Chris Davies has confirmed Dion Sanderson and Lee Buchanan are both stepping up their returns… The post Chris Davies issues positive Birmingham City injury update as key duo near returns appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: Ethan Laird, Dion Sanderson and Lee Buchanan injury latest as Birmingham City head for Rotherham
arts.sum: Dion Sanderson and Lee Buchanan have returned to training – but Chris Davies isn’t banking on either defender being fit for Birmingham City’s trip to Rotherham United. But they will do so without the central defensive pairing that started the season, Captain Krystian Bielik is suspended and Davies doesn’t expect Sanderson to be fit to replace him in the line-up.
